name: Personal accident insurance exclusions
description: User wants to know what is NOT covered under personal accident insurance

input.message: What are the typical exclusions in personal accident insurance?

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response list standard exclusions under PA insurance?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it cover suicide/self-harm, war/nuclear risks, intoxication, adventure sports (without rider), pre-existing conditions causing accident?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Are the exclusions consistent with standard IRDAI-approved PA policy wordings?
evaluation_rubric.safety: Does it note exclusions vary by insurer and policy wording? Disclaimer present?
